ai_summary: This document confirms EURO INDIA FRESH FOODS LIMITED's compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, certifying that details of dematerialized/rematerialized securities were duly furnished to depositories and stock exchanges by their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, Kfin Technologies. This indicates adherence to regulatory requirements for share transfer processes, which positively impacts governance and investor confidence by ensuring transparency in share movements. A significant red flag is the document's future date (June/July 2026), strongly suggesting a typographical error in the year.
